name: Solid OpenID Client (openid-client v6 Solid-OIDC engine)

stack.dpop: @jeswr/solid-dpop (git: jeswr/solid-dpop#main — RFC 9449 proofs; bundled into dist)
stack.modules: ESM (committed self-contained dist/ for github: installs)
stack.test: vitest ^4.x (faithful Map-backed mock OP — real ES256 ID tokens, no live IdP)

federation.membershipTodo: SDK (not an app). createSolidOidcClient() wraps panva's openid-client v6 to perform the Solid-OIDC authorization-code + PKCE + DPoP flow for server-side Node apps (CLIs, services, bots, agents): issuer discovery, code exchange, token refresh, and a DPoP-attaching authed fetch. Composes @jeswr/solid-dpop for the RFC 9449 proofs (key generation + the resource-leg ath-bound proof) and openid-client's getDPoPHandle for the token-endpoint proofs — reimplements neither DPoP nor OIDC. Primary client path is a Client Identifier Document public client; dynamic client registration is a documented secondary seam. It is a login SDK, not a federation member; it holds no federation membership of its own.
